title: Starman
album: David Bowie Starman: The Photography of Mick Rock
why_this_song: Starman by David Bowie (1972) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.
teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

lines: There's a starman waiting in the sky
He'd like to come and meet us
But he thinks he'd blow our minds
There's a starman waiting in the sky
Didn't know what time it was the lights were low oh oh
I leaned back on my radio oh oh

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "children" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "children" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "starman" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "starman" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: I leaned back on my radio oh oh
There's a starman waiting in the sky

exercises.prompt_en: Compare "Starman" with a Brazilian song you know. Do they share a theme? How do their styles differ?
exercises.prompt_pt: Compare "Starman" com alguma música brasileira que você conhece. Elas compartilham algum tema? Como os estilos diferem?

exercises.prompt_en: If you could change the ending of the story told in "Starman", what would happen instead?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse mudar o final da história contada em "Starman", o que aconteceria?

exercises.prompt_en: Describe the mood of "Starman" in three adjectives. What part of the song makes you feel that way?
exercises.prompt_pt: Descreva o clima de "Starman" em três adjetivos. Que parte da música te faz sentir isso?

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:

exercises.prompt_en: Which single word from this song do you think carries the most emotional weight, and why?
exercises.prompt_pt: Qual palavra dessa música carrega mais peso emocional para você, e por quê?

exercises.prompt_en: What kind of person do you imagine the narrator of "Starman" is? Describe their age, mood, and situation using at least three details from the lyrics.
exercises.prompt_pt: Que tipo de pessoa você imagina ser o narrador de "Starman"? Descreva a idade, o humor e a situação usando pelo menos três detalhes da letra.
